summary: A Fox News 'Breaking News' clip of border czar Tom Homan at a Minneapolis press-conference podium describing his meeting with Minnesota leaders, claiming wins on community safety and framing ICE as a legitimate law-enforcement agency. It is raw cable-news press-conference footage with a news chyron and no music or stylized editing. Out of scope as a plain news/speech clip.
notable_text: MINNEAPOLIS LIVE; BREAKING NEWS; NOW: BORDER CZAR TOM HOMAN HOLDS PRESS CONFERENCE; FOX NEWS ALERT
